codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly removes the orphaned confirm_bash tool from live.py. It also properly removes the tool mapping and tool definition. As a bonus, it resolves several strict typing errors (mypy) across live.py, bash_agent.py, and flash_worker.py, resulting in a cleaner codebase.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The backend-worker skill instructs the agent to run `uv run mypy src/` and 'Fix ALL errors.' This caused the worker to fix mypy errors in files outside the feature scope (e.g., flash_worker.py, bash_agent.py) introduced by earlier commits. While beneficial here, this instruction risks severe scope creep in larger codebases with pre-existing typing debt.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows worker running `uv run mypy src/` and subsequently editing flash_worker.py and bash_agent.py, which were not mentioned in the feature description.

summary: Review passed. The worker removed the confirm_bash tool correctly and went above and beyond to fix mypy issues as mandated by its skill prompt.
